title: Find Words Containing Character
titleCn: 查找包含给定字符的单词

testcases.input: words = ["leet","code"], x = "e" Output: [0,1] Explanation: "e" occurs in both words: "leet", and "code". Hence, we return indices 0 and 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: [0,1] Explanation: "e" occurs in both words: "leet", and "code". Hence, we return indices 0 and 1.

testcases.input: words = ["abc","bcd","aaaa","cbc"], x = "a" Output: [0,2] Explanation: "a" occurs in "abc", and "aaaa". Hence, we return indices 0 and 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: [0,2] Explanation: "a" occurs in "abc", and "aaaa". Hence, we return indices 0 and 2.

testcases.input: words = ["abc","bcd","aaaa","cbc"], x = "z" Output: [] Explanation: "z" does not occur in any of the words. Hence, we return an empty array.
testcases.expectedOutput: [] Explanation: "z" does not occur in any of the words. Hence, we return an empty array.
